  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">


    <p>{`The SPM UI Upgrade Helper helps to automates the upgrade process by applying the same UI changes we have made to v8 to a customer’s 7.0.11.0 development environment.`}</p>
    <p>{`To get started, see the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "ui_upgrade_helper_guide"
      }}>{`UI Upgrade Helper guide`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Tools`}</h2>
    <p>{`All of the tools are run sequentially via a single command, as detailed in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "ui_upgrade_helper_guide"
      }}>{`UI Upgrade Helper guide`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3>{`CSS Rules Tool`}</h3>
    <p>{`Scans customer stylesheets and updates the CSS selectors to match the changes we have made when moving to the Carbon design system.`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Iterates over customer CSS files and applies the rules codified in `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://github.com/IBM/spm-ui-upgrade-helper/tree/main/packages/css-rules-tool/rules"
        }}>{`packages/css-rules-tool/rules/*.json`}</a>{`.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Example rules file:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`{
  "SelectorRemove": [
    { "value": ".delete-this-selector" },
    { "value": ".delete-this-selector .and-this" }
    { "value": ".delete-this-selector .and-this-as-well" }
  ],
  "SelectorReplace": [
    {
      "value": ".foo .qux",
      "newValue": ".bar .qux"
    }
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`All of the values in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`SelectorRemove`}</inlineCode>{` will be deleted. The values in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`SelectorReplace`}</inlineCode>{` will be replaced by `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`newValue`}</inlineCode>{`. The order in which the rules are applied is described below.`}</p>
    <h4>{`Ordering of rules`}</h4>
    <p>{`The following steps determine the order of the rules:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`All OOTB rules are loaded.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The rules are sorted by length, with the longest items first, inside each of their respective categories `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`SelectorRemove`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`SelectorReplace`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`SelectorRemove`}</inlineCode>{` rules are applied first, followed by the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`SelectorReplace`}</inlineCode>{` rules.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h4>{`Updating the OOTB rules`}</h4>
    <p>{`If you want to update the OOTB rules so other customers have access to them, `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://github.com/IBM/spm-ui-upgrade-helper"
      }}>{`open a PR`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Icon Replacer Tool`}</h3>
    <p>{`Scans customer files for references to v7 icons and replaces them with their v8 counterparts.`}</p>
    <p>{`Also scans for icon files and replaces them.`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Loads icon replacement mappings from `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://github.com/IBM/spm-ui-upgrade-helper/blob/main/packages/icon-replacer-tool/icon_mappings.json"
        }}>{`packages/icon-replacer-tool/icon-mappings.json`}</a>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Iterates over customer files and replaces any references to old icons with new icons.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`It will also replace any icon files that it finds.`}</li>
    </ul>

    </MDXLayout>;
